one_copy_law: exactly one physical copy: snapshot_download with local_dir and HF_HUB_DISABLE_XET symlink duplication disabled; the hub cache is not kept as a second materialised copy
release_reason: explicit decision to move on, NOT a scientific verdict. The parent was staged, verified byte-exact and fully organ-mapped, but never run: no deepseek_v4 parent-vs-packed forward exists, so the launch packet was RED and no capability claim or BPW ledger was ever produced.
what_survives: config.json, tokenizer.json, tokenizer_config.json, model.safetensors.index.json, _meta/, and the upstream inference/ reference (model.py + kernel.py) - 23 MiB, everything needed to rebuild the forward or rehydrate.
why: native fp8 e4m3 frontier MoE, 1M context, DeepSeek family; maximal distance from the just-sealed Qwen3-235B and the only frontier-class parent whose source is ALREADY sub-8-bit
